metadata.title: Strangelove (Blind Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[01:11.75] There'll be times when my crimes
[01:15.99] Will seem almost unforgivable
[01:19.74] I give in to sin
[01:23.79] Because you have to make this life liveable
[01:27.75] But when you think I've had enough from your sea of love
[01:32.06] I'll take more than another riverfull
[01:35.71] Yes, and I'll make it all worthwhile
[01:42.68] I'll make your heart smile
[01:44.67] Strangelove
[01:46.49] Strange highs and strange lows
[01:48.41] Strangelove
[01:50.60] That's how my love goes
[01:55.42] Strangelove
[01:55.49] Will you give it to me?
[01:57.16] Will you take the pain
[01:59.22] I will give to you?
[02:01.23] Again and again
[02:02.65] And will you return it?
[02:06.79] 
[02:47.20] There'll be days when I'll stray
[02:51.31] I may appear to be constantly out of reach
[02:55.24] I give in to sin
[02:59.30] Because I like to practice what I preach
[03:03.34] I'm not trying to say I'll have it all my way
[03:07.32] I'm always willing to learn when you've got something to teach
[03:11.47] Oh, and I'll make it all worthwhile
[03:18.11] I'll make your heart smile
[03:20.13] Pain, will you return it?
[03:22.92] I'll say it again, pain

[03:46.58] I won't say it again
